name: C-17 compliance-remove exits two when the supplied id is not found in the catalog
command: printf -- '- id: real-source\n' > cat.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" never-existed --catalog cat.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'not found' err.txt && echo unknown 1>&2
